case_title: SHAHAN JANET (CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANT) VS DANZIG LINDA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAHAN JANET (CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANT) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANZIG LINDA NATIONAL TAXICAB SUPPLY CO. $1,627.13 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,654.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
